form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign when last of 7 at Ballarat Bm70 October 14 over 1600m, 11 len behind Active Duty with 59.5kg at $15. When resuming last campaign ran last of 7 at Warwick Farm F&M Bm72 September 3 over 1400m, soft track; 13 len behind Tuileries with 62.5kg at $15. Can do much better here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Restrained through the early stages and settled midfield.
Shortly after the start shifted in and bumped Wounder.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign when last of 13 at Flemington Bm70 December 31 over 1800m, 15 len behind Fiorenot carrying 57.5kg at $21. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.5 len this track Mdn-Sw October 8 over 1427m defeating Racey Casey carrying 59.5kg at $3.10. Can sprint well fresh.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of three-and-a-half months. form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently favourite; won by a nose at this track Bm62 March 29 over 1400m on a soft track defeating Lulu Darling with 58kg at $2.05. The run before that 2nd of 7 at Yarra Valley Bm62 on March 15 over 1200m, long-neck behind Superset carrying 58kg at $5. No reason he cannot get the job done again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the lead and as a result led the field by a significant margin.
Raced keenly in the early stages. Laid in under pressure.
Held up for clear running from the 400m until passing the 250m.

form.formComment: Most recently 8th of 10 at Terang Bm56 on March 17 over 1406m, slow going 6 len behind Eleanor Dumont with 63kg at $14. The start before that 4th of 9 at Kyneton Bm56 on February 27 over 1479m, slow going 3.5 len behind Diamanda with 63kg at $7.50. Not today.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin.
Slow to begin and then restrained after the start.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months couldn't go on with it; second last of 8 at Caulfield Heath 3yo Bm66 on March 18 over 1200m, 7 len behind Oliveanotherday carrying 57.5kg at $19. Previously second-up 4th of 9 at Mornington 0 - 62 on September 5 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Not Surprised with 55.5kg at $8.50. Fitter and is expected to do much better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages, got its head up and refused to settle.
Shortly after the start shifted ground.
Laid out under pressure in the straight.
Laid out under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation eighth of 10 at Cranbourne Bm62 October 31 over 2025m, 4 len behind Frank Express with 59kg at $4.40. When resuming last campaign second of 12 at this track Mdn-Sw July 31 over 1523m, soft track; a nose behind Zoussential carrying 59.5kg at $15. Can run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 400m, bumped by Captain Hilfiger.

Began awkwardly.

form.formComment: Most recently came home strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 7 at Pakenham Cl1 on March 19 over 1200m, on a slow track; nose behind Yamashita's Gold with 57kg at $9.50. The start before that 6th of 8 at Pakenham Bm62 on March 12 over 1000m, 6 len behind Extragalactic carrying 58.5kg at $11. Hard to hold out.

form.formComment: Most recently second last of 8 at this track Bm62 on March 29 over 1400m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Small Town Hero carrying 54kg at $31. The run before that 5th of 8 at Bairnsdale 0 - 62 on March 22 over 1600m, 3 len behind Cryptic Clue carrying 54kg at $12. Eight-year-old gelding who has not shown enough this prep for him to come into calculations.
